docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $663.52 FILED BY U-SAVE PLUMBING & HARDWARE AS TO DEFENDANT TUNNEY, MARTIN DBA TUNNEY PLUMBING COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
